description: Ticker symbol the row belongs to.
Last day of the fiscal period the figures cover.
Date the earnings/results were publicly reported.
Currency the financial statement is reported in.
Actual reported earnings per share for the quarter.
Consensus analyst estimated EPS for the quarter.
Reported EPS minus estimated EPS (absolute surprise).
Earnings surprise as a percentage of the estimate.
Cash and cash equivalents at carrying value.
Net change in cash and equivalents.
Direct cost of goods and services sold (COGS).
Accounts payable due within a year.
Net receivables due within a year.
Revenue received but not yet earned.
Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation & amortization.
Revenue less cost of goods/services sold.
Inventory carried on the balance sheet.
Bottom-line net income (profit) for the period.
Interest income net of interest expense.
Income from sources other than interest (fees, trading).
Net cash generated by operating activities.
Profit from core operations (revenue less operating costs).
Cash paid to repurchase common stock.
Cash paid to repurchase preferred stock.
Net proceeds from issuing long-term debt/capital securities.
Proceeds from sale of treasury stock.
Profit/loss figure used in the cash flow statement.
Assets expected to convert to cash within a year.
Total revenue / net sales for the period.
